title: JVC Partners Up With Control4
bodyHtml:
JVC Partners Up With Control4

The control system is compatible with all JVC D-ILA projector models

Residential Systems Staff

JVC Projectors, Home Theater, a division of JVCKENWOOD USA Corporation, has partnered with Control4, part of ADI | Snap One. The control system is available for home theater projectors and is compatible with all JVC D-ILA projector models.

“We believe in working smarter, not harder,” said Robert Budde, National Product Manager for JVC Home Theater Projectors. “By partnering with ADI | Snap One, we are pleased to offer their Control4 product to our customers, assisting with seamless integration for all.”

With Control4, you can stay connected to JVC D-ILA Home Theater Projectors by pairing the system’s home automation software. Customers can now locate Control4 home automation information on all JVC D-ILA projector product pages.

For more information, visit https://www.jvc.com/usa/pro/projectors/, adiglobal.com, and snapone.com.
